message:
test(db,tools): add 15 tests for integrity checking and reservation index

- integrity.rs: 6 new tests (metrics serialization, CheckKind equality,
  result clone, zero-interval disabled, debug formatting, combined checks)
- reservation_index.rs: 9 new tests (root paths, nested paths, multi-agent,
  glob prefix mismatch, first_segment helper, ref field preservation)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
